name: canvaswright
description: A local Excalidraw canvas for Codex-assisted image creation and visual iteration.

interface.shortDescription: Create and iterate images on a local Excalidraw canvas.
interface.longDescription: Canvaswright gives Codex a project-local Excalidraw canvas with saved scenes, selected-element awareness, AI image holders, and MCP insertion for generated bitmap assets.
defaultPrompt: Open the Canvaswright canvas for this project.
Generate an image into the selected Canvaswright holder.
Use my annotated canvas screenshot to create a clean revision.
